room.caption: [G1-3] Well you could before, but it wouldn't get you anywhere.
room.creationCode:
if global.gameProgress=180 global.gameProgress=190
backFollowFore=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollowFore.type=2 backFollowFore.backSet=backMarioA backFollowFore.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollowFore.yMoveScale=1 backFollowFore.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh2MainA) sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh2SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(101) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=false exitType=2 newMapX=3248 newMapY=256 toRoom=rMario1_2 y+=24
stringToShow="Check out the Options submenu, there's a lot there to customize the game to your preference." signSize=2
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=4 xDir=2 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=2
